chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) كُلَّهُمْ قَائِمُونَ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى هَادُونَ إِلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 128 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup>, all of them<sup>asws</sup> are establishing the Command of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted, guiding to Him<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (242/ 6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (242/ 6)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ نَدْعُوا كُلَّ أُناسٍ بِإِمامِهِمْ قَالَ إِمَامِهِمُ الَّذِي بَيْنَ أَظْهُرِهِمْ وَ هُوَ قَائِمُ أَهْلِ زَمَانِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Shamoun, from Abdullah Bin Abdul Rahman, from Abdullah Bin Al Qasim Al Batal, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘[17:71] The Day when We will Call every human being with their Imam’. Heasws said: ‘Their Imamasws would be that who will be in appearance before them, and heasws is Al-Qaimasws of the people of hisasws era’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan ibn Shammun from ‘Abdallah ibn ‘Abd al-Rahman from ‘Abdallah ibn al-Qasim al-Batal from ‘Abdallah ibn Sinan who has said the following. “I asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the meaning of , ‘On the day when We will call every nation with her Imam (leader) . .” [17:71] The Imam (a.s.) said, “It refers to the Imam who is with them and he is al-Qa’im of the people of that time.”
